mapper.select: SELECT LOWER(t.status) AS status, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0 GROUP BY LOWER(t.status)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT st.ticket_id) FROM sla_timer st WHERE st.deleted = 0 AND st.is_breached = 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.create_time >= #{startTime} AND t.create_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY day ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.closed_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.closed_at IS NOT NULL AND t.closed_at >= #{startTime} AND t.closed_at < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.closed_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.create_time < #{startTime} AND (t.closed_at IS NULL OR t.closed_at >= #{startTime})

SELECT t.category_id AS categoryId, COALESCE(c.name, '未分类') AS categoryName, COUNT(1) AS ticketCount, 0 AS percentage FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.category_id, c.name ORDER BY ticketCount DESC

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN st.timer_type = 'RESPONSE' THEN st.elapsed_minutes END), 2), 0) AS avgResponseMinutes, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN st.timer_type = 'RESOLVE' THEN st.elapsed_minutes END), 2), 0) AS avgResolveMinutes, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ticket t2 WHERE t2.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t2.status) IN ('completed', 'closed')) AS completedCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ticket t3 WHERE t3.deleted = 0) AS totalCount, 0 AS completionRate FROM sla_timer st WHERE st.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN st.is_breached = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS achievedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN st.is_breached = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS breachedCount, 0 AS achievementRate FROM sla_timer st WHERE st.deleted = 0 AND st.timer_type = 'RESOLVE'

SELECT t.assignee_id AS assigneeId, COALESCE(u.name, '未知用户') AS assigneeName, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(t.status) IN ('completed', 'closed') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS processingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(t.status) IN ('completed', 'closed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.assignee_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.assignee_id, u.name ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
